rulings.Case Title: YEONG JOO KIM VS. DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Dismiss Second Amended Complaint Against Defendant Mtc Financial
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 29, 2012, line 1. Motion To Dismiss Second Amended Complaint Against Defendant Mtc Financial. Grant dismissal with prejudice against MTC Financial. No oppositon filed and no Third Amended Complaint filed in over one year. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ALIX SANTA-IGLESIA et al VS. BALWANTSINH THAKOR, INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA THE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs; Motion For A Protective; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Laleh Zelinsky, And His Counsel Of Record, Vincent J. Adams And Kara Ann Smith Pursuant To Ccp 2019.030, 2023.010 And 2030.090
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 29, 2012, line 10. Plaintiffs' Motion For A Protective Order; Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Laleh Zelinsky, And His Counsel Of Record, Vincent J. Adams And Kara Ann Smith Pursuant To Ccp 2019.030, 2023.010 And 2030.090. Deny - discovery relevant to claims made by plaintiff - while large they are based on clear allegations made in complaint. Sanctions denied as to each party. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: YASIN A. SALMA (AS CO-TRUSTEE OF THE YASIN A. AND et al VS. CINDY DUGHI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn For Leave To File X-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 29, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANT CINDY DUGHI's Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint. Deny proposed cross complaint can be pursued in separate action. No showing of relation to this action. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANTONIO CASTELLUCCI VS. SHANE KROL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Vacate Judgment; Memo Of P & A And Pos
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 29, 2012, line 3. DEFENDANT SHANE KROLL's Motion To Vacate Judgment. Deny. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANTONIO CASTELLUCCI VS. SHANE KROL et al

rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 29, 2012, line 3. DEFENDANT SHANE KROLLs' Motion For Relief From Forfeiture Under Ccp1179. Deny. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CINDY OILAR, TRUSTEE OF THE SILVIO L. SCOCCA 1996 VS. ANTHONY BICKEL et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 29, 2012, line 4. DEFENDANTs ANTHONY BICKEL and KATHERINE PARRICK's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. Continued to Nov. 13, 2012, per ex parte order of Oct. 19, 2012. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JIAN HAN WU VS. SU-CHU CHEN
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 29, 2012, line 5. DEFENDANT SU-CHU CHEN's DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Overrule - five days to answer. Demurrer impermissibly raises issues of fact re need for electrical and plumbing permits for conversion of illegal unit to laundry room. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GMAC MORTGAGE, LLC VS. DANIEL ESPINOSA et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, October 29, 2012, line 6. DEFENDANT DANIEL ESPINOSA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to amend to address inclusion of 15 USC 1692 language into notice signed by attorney. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION VS. DON L LINDNER et al
